name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
ℹ️ CryptoWatch — your crypto price tracker.

📊 Price — check current prices for your watchlist
📋 Watchlist — add or remove coins you track
⚙️ Settings — set your timezone, quiet hours, and summary time
🔔 Alerts — get notified when prices hit your targets

Everything is button-driven — just tap /start to open the menu.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
